falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 indicates extreme momentum consistent with a blowoff top, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and the historical bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average with a 3-day average volume surge of 200% above the 30-day mean
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal a confirmed bullish breakout, invalidating the HOLD verdict by demonstrating a trend reversal opposite to the historical bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2022_may_luna drops below 50%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the historical pattern would invalidate the current verdict's reliance on pattern recognition, proving the UNKNOWN phase is incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
